_comment: PR 210 (Cost Telemetry) rate card. Costs are ADVISORY estimates — est_cost_usd, not precise_cost_usd. Rates are per 1,000,000 tokens (USD). Default entry is used for unknown models; non-LLM stages skip the rate card entirely and record est_cost_usd=0.
_source: https://www.anthropic.com/pricing — snapshot, may drift; override with COST_RATE_CARD_PATH env var.
